nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.comment: Accepts JSON: { text, voice_preset (optional), output_format (optional), channel (optional), api_key (optional header) }. Set BARK_API_KEY env var to enable authentication.

nodes.name: Validate Input
nodes.comment: API key auth (if BARK_API_KEY set). Validates text length (max 1024), voice_preset pattern, output_format allowlist, channel format.
nodes.notes: Validates: text (required, max 1024 chars), voice_preset (alphanumeric/slash/dash, optional), output_format (wav/mp3/ogg/flac/webm), channel (alphanumeric/dash/underscore)

parameters.text:
={{ '*Bark TTS Complete*

**Format:** ' + ($json.format || 'unknown') + '
**Sample Rate:** ' + ($json.sample_rate || 0) + ' Hz
**Audio Size:** ' + Math.round(($json.audio_size_bytes || 0) / 1024) + ' KB**

✅ Generation successful!' }}

nodes.name: Discord Output
nodes.comment: Sends success notification to the channel specified in the validated input (or 'general' if not provided)

parameters.text:
={{ '*Bark TTS Failed*

**Error:** ' + (($input.all()[0]?.error?.message || $input.all()[0]?.error?.description || 'Unknown error')).toString().slice(0, 997).trimEnd() + '

Please check:
- Bark service is running
- Text is provided and under 1024 characters
- voice_preset is valid (alphanumeric, slash, dash)
- output_format is valid (wav, mp3, ogg, flac, webm)
- API key is correct (if configured)' }}

nodes.name: Discord Error
nodes.comment: Catches errors from all nodes. Uses Validate Input for channel access and shows validation requirements.
